videos.title: Dimir Artifacts Got Another Synthesizer and a New Two Drop
videos.description:
It looks like the Simulacrum Synthesizer got a Synthesizer Labship and a new two-drop in Emissary Escort that could pair nicely with the other cards that have affinity!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/single-scoop-dimir-artifacts-got-another-synthesizer-and-a-new-two-drop
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7287174#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/6AvHl
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/youMI
